title: gentiana montana var. pleurogynoides
intro: Gentiana montana var. pleurogynoides, also known as Himalayan gentian or giant gentian, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a digestive aid and to stimulate the appetite due to its bitter compounds. The health benefits of Gentiana montana var. pleurogynoides include its potential to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat digestive problems and other related health issues.
